title: Menahuu
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Menahu''' was the native language of the [[Menahuun]] species from [[Lamaredd/Legends|Lamaredd]].

==Notable non-native speakers of Menahuu==
*[[Byrch Dyshkava]], ''The Padawan''
